name: ProtoPie
description: Advanced no-code prototyping tool for high-fidelity, sensor-aware interactions without code. Supports touch, keyboard, sound, and hardware sensor inputs. Used at Apple, Google, and Samsung.

seo.title: ProtoPie — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: ProtoPie: Advanced no-code prototyping tool for high-fidelity, sensor-aware interactions without code. Supports touch, keyboard, sound, and hardware sensor inpu

when_to_use: Sensor-aware prototype testing tilt interaction for mobile app
High-fidelity voice interaction prototype demoed to stakeholders
Apple Watch interaction prototyped using hardware sensor inputs
Complex conditional flow prototyped without writing any code
TV remote prototype tested using keyboard input simulation

pros: Supports touch, keyboard, sound, and real hardware inputs
Used at Apple, Google, Samsung — credibility is real
Cross-platform with desktop and cloud options
cons: Learning curve steeper than basic Figma prototyping
Asset pipeline requires upfront Figma/Sketch import
review.verdict: The serious choice for high-fidelity, sensor-aware prototypes; worth the price for product teams shipping complex UX.
review.best_for: Product teams prototyping complex interactions, hardware integrations, or multi-sensor flows.
review.not_for: Teams needing only basic clickable mockups or tight budget constraints.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
